notes: Single Go test failure, macos-latest only. Ecosystem=go fills v1.3 gap (was 0/16, target 4 in v2). signal_position=middle (FAIL block at L243-247 of 545 ≈ 45%) — primary diagnostic outside tail-200's window (L346-545), which captures only the bare FAIL + ##[error] without the failing test name or message. Useful stress for tail-200's recall on this kind of mid-log Go test failure.
